blocks.text: Status Report: Post-Close Integration Support for {{fact:f:E-2024-001.client}}
Prepared by Sandra Perez, Director, Fernhollow Partners, for the executive team of Nguyen, Reynolds and Martinez.

The engagement is on track. What changed this period: the chart of accounts mapping was adopted, and the first combined monthly close ran under the aligned calendar. What it means: your reporting now comes off one structure, and the remaining work is documentation and cleanup rather than design. The one open thread is a small set of intercompany balances still awaiting source detail from your team.

items: Chart of accounts mapping adopted and in use for the combined close
First combined monthly close completed under the aligned reporting calendar
Opening balance reconciliations completed, except the flagged intercompany items Ryan Strong is holding open pending client records
Audit-ready working papers for the opening balances
Close process documentation for handoff to your controller group
First draft of the board readout, prepared by Briana Dennis

blocks.text: Year-end audit requests will compete for your staff's time this period, and the flagged intercompany items cannot close without their input. What we need from you: the source detail already requested, and a named reviewer for the close documentation, both before the next working session. Neither request is large; both are on the critical path.
Work performed to date remains within the fixed fee of {{fact:f:E-2024-001.fee}} agreed in the engagement letter. No change to scope or budget is requested.
